channel.title: Dry Garden Dispatch
channel.description: Fresh takes for succulent and cactus growers.

item.title: The light checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified light purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of soil
item.description: The most common early stumbles in soil, and the cheap corrections that fix them for succulent and cactus growers.

item.title: "grow lights succulents" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about grow lights succulents through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your arrangements questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the arrangements questions succulent and cactus growers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The state of Propagation in 2026
item.description: A field report on propagation: where things stand, and what succulent and cactus growers should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Soil without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to soil for succulent and cactus growers — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "succulent soil mix" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "succulent soil mix" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why succulent are rethinking Light
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how succulent and cactus growers approach light — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Arrangements on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in arrangements — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Soil: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping soil for succulent and cactus growers.
